rationale.R1.2: The agent identified multiple inconsistencies and provided detailed fixes, demonstrating end-to-end analysis.
rationale.R1.3: Audited every major claim against evidence, ensuring alignment and suggesting improvements.
rationale.R1.4: Named prior works but didn't map against multiple, hence a middle score.
rationale.RX.1: Suggested uncertainty measures but didn't mark each recommendation with confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: Stayed within scope without drifting, addressing all relevant points.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content introduced; improved the original by highlighting issues.
rationale.RX.5: Traced major changes but missed some minor edits.
